title: Hemionitis crenulans
taxonomy: Hemionitis crenulans is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This classification places it within the division Pteridophyta, which encompasses all vascular plants that are ferns. The family Dryopteridaceae is a group of ferns that are commonly known as the wood ferns or dryopterids. These ferns are characterized by their simple leaves and spore-producing structures, often found in shaded, moist environments. Hemionitis crenulans can be further classified as a member of the genus Hemionitis, which is a small group of ferns with distinctive leaf morphology.
